multi_destination.description: Method types that permit multiple destinations within one cart (e.g. split shipping across addresses). Listing a method permits it; an omitted method does not. Open — businesses MAY list any method type.

method.description: Fulfillment method type (e.g. `shipping`, `pickup`). Optional per-method constraints MAY be added alongside.

method_combinations.description: Method-type combinations the business permits within one cart. Each inner array is a permitted set of method `type` values (e.g. shipping + pickup).
